summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Cat Inspect AI UI/UX refactor. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend enterprise design successfully implemented with theme toggle, improved styling, and all core functionality maintained.

ui_bugs.issue: FAB button click blocked by Emergent badge overlay
ui_bugs.details: Overlay element intercepts pointer events, preventing FAB click. Navigation works via direct URL.

passed_tests: All 15 backend API endpoints working (100% success)
Dashboard page loads with updated enterprise design
Theme toggle switches between light and dark mode perfectly
Inspections table displays data with improved CAT styling
Status badges render correctly (PASS, FAIL, MONITOR, In Progress)
Search and filter functionality works correctly
AI chatbot widget sends/receives messages successfully
Analytics cards display charts with proper enterprise styling
New Inspection wizard loads with 3-step structure (Equipment, Type, Review)
Inspection Detail page has all 5 tabs working (Summary, Checklist, Media, Parts, Connect)
Status badges and severity badges render correctly (9 status + 8 severity badges found)
CAT yellow branding applied throughout interface
Card system with hover effects working
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix FAB button overlay issue by adjusting z-index or positioning of Emergent badge to prevent pointer event interception. Consider adding force=True to click actions or repositioning overlay elements.
